title: fix: deploy script domain reclaim + sirius-cybernetics biome fixes
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Elevator maintenance
gist.blurb: We've tuned up the deployment scripts to properly route our community apps and gave the Sirius Cybernetics Elevator a fresh coat of lint-free paint.
gist.summary: Updated the app deployment scripts to reclaim custom domains from legacy projects and resolved Biome formatting issues in the Sirius Cybernetics Elevator app.
gist.impact: Community apps will now correctly route to their new deployment targets with updated DNS records.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot wearing a hard hat, fixing a retro futuristic elevator control panel or routing glowing cables to represent DNS and domain routing.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, plugging glowing lime green (#ecf874) cables into a retro-futuristic elevator control panel. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
